text:
Edwin Groothuis schrieb:
> Maintainer of textproc/p5-OpenOffice-OODoc,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/142673 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix

> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/142673

Attached patch is updated to latest Version.

Please commit.

Regards
    matthias
